case_title: KARCZEWSKI ANDRZEJ VS HUANG BING QUAN

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HUANG BING QUAN
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY KARCZEWSKI ANDRZEJ AS TO DEFENDANT HUANG BING QUAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-29-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
